description: Jenkins SDLC Pipeline — build metrics, quality, coverage, performance, deploy

list.name: env
list.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -90d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pipeline_run")
  |> keep(columns: ["env"])
  |> distinct(column: "env")
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "value"})
list.label: Environment

list.name: app
list.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -90d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pipeline_run")
  |> keep(columns: ["app"])
  |> distinct(column: "app")
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "value"})
list.label: App

list.name: build_nr
list.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -90d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pipeline_run")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "build_nr")
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
  |> group()
  |> distinct(column: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({build_nr: string(v: r._value), _value: string(v: r._value)}))
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "value"})
  |> group(columns: ["build_nr"])
list.label: Build #

title: Jenkins Builds

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -90d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pipeline_run")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all" or "${build_nr}" != "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "build_nr")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _bnr: string(v: r._value)}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => "${build_nr}" == "$__all" or "${build_nr}" == "" or r._bnr == "${build_nr}")
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r.result == "SUCCESS" then 1 else if r.result == "FAILURE" then 2 else if r.result == "ABORTED" then 3 else 4}))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -90d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pipeline_run")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all" or "${build_nr}" != "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "build_nr" or r._field == "duration_ms")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => "${build_nr}" == "$__all" or "${build_nr}" == "" or string(v: r.build_nr) == "${build_nr}")
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> last(column: "duration_ms")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.duration_ms}))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pipeline_run")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "build_nr")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pipeline_run")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "build_nr")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.result == "SUCCESS")
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value) }))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pipeline_run")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "build_nr")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.result == "FAILURE")
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value) }))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pipeline_run")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "duration_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jenkins_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project_name == "${app}" or "${app}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tests_total" or r._field == "tests_failed" or r._field == "tests_skipped")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, passed: r.tests_total - r.tests_failed - r.tests_skipped, failed: r.tests_failed, skipped: r.tests_skipped}))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "coverage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "line_pct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "code_quality")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bugs" or r._field == "vulnerabilities" or r._field == "code_smells")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "code_quality")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "duplications_pct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gatling_run")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "mean_ms" or r._field == "p95_ms" or r._field == "p99_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gatling_run")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "throughput_rps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gatling_run")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "error_rate_pct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "deploy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "prod")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "artifact_version")
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r.status == "SUCCESS" then 1 else 2}))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "deploy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "prod")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "artifact_version")
  |> last()

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "deploy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "artifact_version" or r._field == "duration_ms")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "app", "env", "status", "artifact_version", "duration_ms"])

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jenkins_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project_name == "${app}" or "${app}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tests_failed")
  |> last()

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jenkins_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project_name == "${app}" or "${app}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tests_total")
  |> last()

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jenkins_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project_name == "${app}" or "${app}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tests_total" or r._field == "tests_failed" or r._field == "tests_skipped")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, passed: r.tests_total - r.tests_failed - r.tests_skipped, failed: r.tests_failed, skipped: r.tests_skipped}))

options.content:
## Functional / Selenium Tests

This stage is currently a **stub** — cross-QA-team Selenium scenarios are not yet onboarded.

Once instrumented, results will be written to the `functional_results` measurement and displayed here.

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "security_scan")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.app == "${app}" or "${app}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "critical")
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> last()

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "security_scan")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.app == "${app}" or "${app}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "high")
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> last()

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "security_scan")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.app == "${app}" or "${app}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "moderate")
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> last()

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "security_scan")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.app == "${app}" or "${app}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "low")
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> last()

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "security_scan")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.app == "${app}" or "${app}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "critical" or r._field == "high" or r._field == "moderate" or r._field == "low")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -90d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "security_finding")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.app == "${app}" or "${app}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.env == "${env}" or "${env}" == "$__all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "title" or r._field == "url" or r._field == "fix_available" or r._field == "build_nr")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => "${build_nr}" == "$__all" or "${build_nr}" == "" or string(v: r.build_nr) == "${build_nr}")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "package_name", "severity", "title", "url", "fix_available", "build_nr"])
